message:
chore: update beads tracker - close bd-ml2r.11.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -425,7 +425,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.11","title":"[FNX] Comprehensive verification matrix: unit + integration + e2e + evidence logs","description":"Goal
Guarantee implementation quality with comprehensive unit/integration/e2e coverage and high-fidelity structured logs.

Scope
- Build a cross-crate FNX verification matrix.
- Add deterministic replay scripts and evidence capture conventions.
- Validate CLI and WASM surfaces with scenario corpora.
- Define mandatory log schema for all FNX-assisted decisions.

Acceptance Criteria
- Verification matrix is complete and maintained in repo.
- E2E scripts are reproducible and documented.
- Structured logs provide sufficient granularity for root-cause analysis.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.716830907Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:23:24.003090125Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","fnx","observability","qa","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.716830907Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.448914303Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:14.285088469Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:14.349942618Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:14.421792526Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:14.487250387Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:14.556202525Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","title":"[FNX] QA subtask: exhaustive unit tests for FNX branches","description":"Goal
Add comprehensive unit test suites across fm-core/fm-parser/fm-layout/fm-cli/fm-wasm for FNX paths.

Scope
- Happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and failure paths.
- Determinism assertions on repeated runs.
- Projection policy correctness assertions.

Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage includes all newly introduced FNX branches.
- Tests are deterministic and non-flaky.
- Failing tests provide actionable diagnostics.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.780420136Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-14T04:33:15.598512486Z","closed_at":"2026-04-14T04:33:15.598304052Z","close_reason":"Added 21 new unit tests for FNX diagnostics module including edge cases, recommendation factory tests, and type coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fnx","testing","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.232009270Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.297648309Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.780420136Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.523481844Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.584819824Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.644718647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","title":"[FNX] QA subtask: CLI+WASM end-to-end scenario scripts","description":"Goal
Create end-to-end test scripts exercising real user flows across CLI and wasm/browser surfaces.

Scope
- Scenario suites for baseline, fnx-enabled, strict-mode, and timeout fallback paths.
- Scripted assertions for outputs, diagnostics, and witness payloads.
- Artifact capture for diffing and reproducibility.

Acceptance Criteria
- E2E scripts run in CI and locally with consistent results.
- Scenarios include large/complex/pathological diagrams.
- Logs and artifacts are retained for regression investigations.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

-{"id":"bd-ml2r.11.3","title":"[FNX] QA subtask: deterministic replay and benchmark regression harness","description":"Goal
Build deterministic replay + benchmark harness for quality, latency, and determinism regressions.

Scope
- Re-run identical scenarios multiple times with hash checks.
- Track parse/analysis/layout/render timings and variance.
- Compare baseline vs fnx-enabled quality metrics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Determinism replay harness is automated.
- Benchmark outputs feed rollout decisions.
- Threshold breaches fail CI with actionable reports.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.11.4","title":"[FNX] QA subtask: structured log schema and evidence bundle contract","description":"Goal
Standardize structured log schema and evidence bundle format for all FNX-assisted execution paths.

Scope
- Required fields and type constraints for scenario logs.
- Evidence bundle layout for CI artifacts.
- Validation lints to reject incomplete log payloads.

Acceptance Criteria
- Log schema is documented and machine-validated.
- All FNX e2e scripts emit schema-compliant logs.
- Evidence bundles are consistent and easy to inspect.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests

- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","notes":"Implemented structured evidence log schema in fm-core/src/evidence.rs with EvidenceLogEntry, FnxMode, ProjectionMode, DecisionMode, FallbackReason, PassFailReason types. Added JSON Schema for validation. 10 unit tests passing.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.054997312Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-14T04:08:29.736387276Z","closed_at":"2026-04-14T04:08:29.735730604Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fnx","logging","observability","qa"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.054997312Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.988169715Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.12","title":"[FNX] Compatibility, migration safety, and trust-preserving rollout track","description":"Goal
Protect users from regressions by making FNX integration explicitly compatibility-aware, measurable, and rollback-safe.

Scope
- Guarantee fnx-off baseline behavior remains stable and verifiable.
- Quantify fnx-on deltas with explicit quality/performance thresholds.
- Provide migration guidance and safety checks for users enabling FNX features.
- Establish canary and rollback procedures across CLI and WASM surfaces.

User Impact
- Prevent surprising behavior changes for existing users.
- Build trust with transparent before/after evidence.
- Reduce support burden via deterministic compatibility diagnostics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Baseline compatibility matrix exists and is test-enforced.
- FNX-on vs FNX-off differential reports are generated and reviewed.
- Migration guardrails and rollback playbook are documented and tested.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.449468653Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:31:14.201461133Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compatibility","fnx","qa","rollout","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.449468653Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.839746689Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.897468963Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.780527088Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":132,"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Compatibility track now inherits the same mandatory verification contract as all other FNX beads; this closes prior coverage gap and guarantees canary/rollback decisions are backed by deterministic evidence and reproducible CLI+WASM scenario logs.","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:31:14Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.12.1","title":"[FNX] Compatibility subtask: fnx-off baseline snapshot and invariants","description":"Goal
Create deterministic fnx-off baseline snapshots and enforce no-regression invariants.

Scope
- Capture parser/layout/render snapshots for representative corpora in fnx-off mode.
- Define strict invariants for output stability and diagnostics consistency.
- Add CI checks to prevent accidental baseline drift.

Acceptance Criteria
- Snapshot corpus covers common + edge-case diagrams.
- Baseline checks are deterministic and CI-enforced.
- Drift reports include actionable diff summaries.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
